title: EffectSMP : Reimagined
description:
The official plugin for Effect SMP : Reimagined.

Add custom abilities and items based on default Minecraft effects.
body:
# **The official plugin for Effect SMP : Reimagined.**


```
This plugin adds custom abilities and items based on default Minecraft effects.
```


- All players start with a random effect and 1 effect heart and have to progress through their effect by reaching up to 3 effect hearts to be able to use all off their effect's potential.
- There are 7 default effects which can be obtained on start and can be changed with the use of an effect reroll item which can be crafted. There are also 3 OP effects which can only be obtained by crafting an OP effect reroll item.
- Most messages of the plugin can be modified via the messages.yml.
- All craft recipes can be modified via the recipes.yml.
- The plugin can be configured via the config.yml.

### Effect list:
```
Default Effects:
    - Health Boost
    - Speed
    - Invisbility
    - Haste
    - Dolphin Grace
    - Hero Of The Village
    - Fire Resistance
Op Effects:
    - Regeneration
    - Strength
    - Resistance
```

Modification of plugin is allowed only if the creator ([me](https://github.com/mlnplus)) is credited for the base work.

The plugins source code can be found on the [github](https://github.com/mlnplus/EffectSMP-Reimagined) page of the plugin.

## If you make a server or even a video with the plugin feel free to send me a dm on discord!
